_comment: Hand-built pollution/forgetting timeline (evals/README.md §5.2). Two facts get corrected (their old versions must stop surfacing); two rare-but-true facts are low-salience and never contradicted (they must survive decay). A flat store keeps surfacing the stale facts; the HydroMemory lifecycle (pollute + decay) should not. Synthetic = controlled demonstration.

timeline.content: The product launch is scheduled for March 3.
The Pro plan costs 40 dollars per month.
The CEO's daughter is named Mei.
The company headquarters is located in Lisbon.
The ingestion service is written in Rust.
On-call shifts rotate every Monday morning.

timeline.with: The product launch slipped to April 10.
The Pro plan now costs 55 dollars per month.

timeline.probe: when is the product launch scheduled
how much does the Pro plan cost per month
what is the name of the CEO's daughter
where is the company headquarters located
when is the product launch scheduled
